emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The Diamond Coast Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 56/100
========================================

7 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- No HTTPS
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 1 H1 tag only
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 12 inline styles
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No viewport meta
 HIGH
--------------------
- Broken booking link
 HIGH
--------------------
- Not mobile responsive
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No favicon


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.label: No HTTPS
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: 1 H1 tag only
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: 12 inline styles
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: No viewport meta
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: The reservation or booking system link leads to a dead page.
issues.label: Broken booking link
issues.check: Click through the booking/reservation process end-to-end.
issues.siteHint: A broken booking link is a direct loss of revenue.

issues.detail: The site doesn't adapt to different screen sizes. Buttons and text overlap on mobile.
issues.label: Not mobile responsive
issues.check: Resize your browser to mobile width. Does content break or overflow?
issues.siteHint: 93% of couples research venues on their phone before booking.

issues.label: No favicon
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.
